---
title: "Publications"
---


## Published articles

### Stochastic thermal machines and interacting systems

**Title of the paper**  
Iago Mamede, Coauthors  
*Journal*, volume, page, year.  
[DOI](#) | [arXiv](#) | [BibTeX](#)

Short description: In this work, we investigated how interactions modify the thermodynamic performance of stochastic thermal machines.

---

### Nonequilibrium phase transitions

**Title of the paper**  
Iago Mamede, Coauthors  
*Journal*, volume, page, year.  
[DOI](#) | [arXiv](#) | [BibTeX](#)
